payload.model_instruction: Answer the user's question directly from the compact evidence. Explain what the evidence means; do not answer with a file list or raw excerpt dump. For broad internal concepts, synthesize across evidence roles: definition, UI/control surface, state model, tool/capability registry, runtime behavior, and authority boundaries when present. Write a concise direct answer from the evidence. Preserve authority claims exactly: receipts are observations/supporting artifacts, not final-answer authority. Do not claim evidence is missing when compact_evidence is non-empty. Use compact refs from compact_evidence as support_refs for terminal authority. When citing, do not put each source on its own bullet line; use one short parenthetical citation or one compact Sources sentence with semicolon-separated refs. The required model step is model.synthesize_from_repo_evidence and the terminal product is repo_code_evidence_answer.

payload.text: El lenguaje de respuesta final de Helix Ask se basa en la generación de respuestas que son coherentes y fundamentadas en evidencia. Esto se logra a través de herramientas específicas que procesan solicitudes y generan salidas basadas en marcos de referencia y especificaciones definidas. Por ejemplo, el "Civilization Bounds Roadmap Tool" produce un mapa de ruta que refleja las condiciones de un escenario específico, mientras que el "Fruition Tool" se encarga de generar expresiones de procedimiento deterministas que incluyen artefactos de admisión. Además, el "Theory-Ideology Bridge Tool" crea puentes conceptuales basados en teorías y reflexiones ideológicas, asegurando que las respuestas sean válidas y basadas en evidencia (server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:107).

payload.instruction_to_model: The repo/docs evidence retrieval succeeded, but the previous draft was not a valid terminal answer. Write one concise natural-language synthesis that directly answers the user. Explain what the evidence establishes. Include compact support refs only as short inline citations or one semicolon-separated Sources sentence. Do not put each source on its own bullet line, do not paste code, do not list files as the answer, and do not claim evidence is missing. Use these compact evidence refs as support, not as the answer itself: server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:10 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-scenario-frame-tool.test.ts:102 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:10 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:107 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:11 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-scenario-frame-tool.test.ts:13 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:11 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:109 (test_contract).

payload.model_instruction: Answer the user's question directly from the compact evidence. Explain what the evidence means; do not answer with a file list or raw excerpt dump. For broad internal concepts, synthesize across evidence roles: definition, UI/control surface, state model, tool/capability registry, runtime behavior, and authority boundaries when present. Write a concise direct answer from the evidence. Preserve authority claims exactly: receipts are observations/supporting artifacts, not final-answer authority. Do not claim evidence is missing when compact_evidence is non-empty. Use compact refs from compact_evidence as support_refs for terminal authority. When citing, do not put each source on its own bullet line; use one short parenthetical citation or one compact Sources sentence with semicolon-separated refs. The required model step is model.synthesize_from_repo_evidence and the terminal product is repo_code_evidence_answer.

payload.text: El lenguaje de respuesta final de Helix Ask se basa en la generación de respuestas que son coherentes y fundamentadas en evidencia. Esto se logra a través de herramientas específicas que procesan solicitudes y generan salidas basadas en marcos de referencia y especificaciones definidas. Por ejemplo, el "Civilization Bounds Roadmap Tool" produce un mapa de ruta que refleja las condiciones de un escenario específico, mientras que el "Fruition Tool" se encarga de generar expresiones de procedimiento deterministas que incluyen artefactos de admisión. Además, el "Theory-Ideology Bridge Tool" crea puentes conceptuales basados en teorías y reflexiones ideológicas, asegurando que las respuestas sean válidas y basadas en evidencia (server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:107).

payload.instruction_to_model: The repo/docs evidence retrieval succeeded, but the previous draft was not a valid terminal answer. Write one concise natural-language synthesis that directly answers the user. Explain what the evidence establishes. Include compact support refs only as short inline citations or one semicolon-separated Sources sentence. Do not put each source on its own bullet line, do not paste code, do not list files as the answer, and do not claim evidence is missing. Use these compact evidence refs as support, not as the answer itself: server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:10 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-scenario-frame-tool.test.ts:102 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:10 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:107 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:11 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-scenario-frame-tool.test.ts:13 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:11 (test_contract); server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:109 (test_contract).

final_answer_draft.text: El lenguaje de respuesta final de Helix Ask se basa en la generación de respuestas que son coherentes y fundamentadas en evidencia. Esto se logra a través de herramientas específicas que procesan solicitudes y generan salidas basadas en marcos de referencia y especificaciones definidas. Por ejemplo, el "Civilization Bounds Roadmap Tool" produce un mapa de ruta que refleja las condiciones de un escenario específico, mientras que el "Fruition Tool" se encarga de generar expresiones de procedimiento deterministas que incluyen artefactos de admisión. Además, el "Theory-Ideology Bridge Tool" crea puentes conceptuales basados en teorías y reflexiones ideológicas, asegurando que las respuestas sean válidas y basadas en evidencia (server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:107).

repo_docs_synthesis_packet.model_instruction: Answer the user's question directly from the compact evidence. Explain what the evidence means; do not answer with a file list or raw excerpt dump. For broad internal concepts, synthesize across evidence roles: definition, UI/control surface, state model, tool/capability registry, runtime behavior, and authority boundaries when present. Write a concise direct answer from the evidence. Preserve authority claims exactly: receipts are observations/supporting artifacts, not final-answer authority. Do not claim evidence is missing when compact_evidence is non-empty. Use compact refs from compact_evidence as support_refs for terminal authority. When citing, do not put each source on its own bullet line; use one short parenthetical citation or one compact Sources sentence with semicolon-separated refs. The required model step is model.synthesize_from_repo_evidence and the terminal product is repo_code_evidence_answer.

repo_code_evidence_answer.text: El lenguaje de respuesta final de Helix Ask se basa en la generación de respuestas que son coherentes y fundamentadas en evidencia. Esto se logra a través de herramientas específicas que procesan solicitudes y generan salidas basadas en marcos de referencia y especificaciones definidas. Por ejemplo, el "Civilization Bounds Roadmap Tool" produce un mapa de ruta que refleja las condiciones de un escenario específico, mientras que el "Fruition Tool" se encarga de generar expresiones de procedimiento deterministas que incluyen artefactos de admisión. Además, el "Theory-Ideology Bridge Tool" crea puentes conceptuales basados en teorías y reflexiones ideológicas, asegurando que las respuestas sean válidas y basadas en evidencia (server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/civilization-bounds-roadmap-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/fruition-tool.test.ts:10; server/services/helix-ask/__tests__/theory-ideology-bridge-tool.test.ts:107).
